name: ship-cargo-hold
summary: The belly of the ship — stacked crates and barrels lashed to ring-bolts, bilge-damp air, a single shaft of light from a grate above.

primary_palette.note: main cargo block lashed down for sea
a specific manifest item — the cargo worth the voyage
contraband — creature or slave cargo hidden among goods
a light load — holds mostly ballast, trouble for the captain

story_prompts: a stowaway lives among the crates
the manifest is a lie — something in the chests has started moving
rats with too much intelligence have taken the hold
flood damage mid-voyage — stuff floats, the crew is bailing

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: very dim (0.1), single grate-shaft of daylight if above water

anti_patterns: always leave a central aisle — cargo goes along the sides, lashed
don't float crates in the middle of the floor unless flooded
the hold has no windows (above bilge) — lighting must be artificial
